concerns.text: SC-006 contains incomplete placeholder text: 'of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated.' The percentage/threshold value is missing. This is a writing defect, not a requirement defect, as the metric itself is well-defined.

SC-012 contains incomplete placeholder text in two places: (1) 'achieves match threshold for pass/fail status' - threshold value missing; (2) 'where reference coverage of dataset' - coverage percentage missing; (3) 'If KnotInfo reference coverage' - condition incomplete. These are writing defects requiring placeholder values to be filled.

SC-005 contains malformed exponential backoff notation: 'exponential backoff (→ → →... → max)'. The retry sequence values are missing. Should specify initial delay, max delay, and multiplier values as referenced in FR-010.
FR-003 contains incomplete placeholder: 'If KnotInfo reference coverage is of the dataset' - percentage value missing. This mirrors the issue in SC-012 and should be consistent.
